title: Guglielmo Marconi
content:
I like Marconi best to see
    Beneath a Macaroni tree
    Playing that Nocturne in F Sharp
    By Chopin, on a Wireless Harp.
meaning:
"Guglielmo Marconi" is a quintessential example of Oliver Herford's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
